content:
I have been working some time on formulating my idea of how any potential editor should communicate with Roc's compiler.
The document is far from complete, but next few days I wont be able to work on it, and I wanted to get some feedback about the direction:

https://docs.google.com/document/d/1v7EfkxttpcMkaJspsgBnvH3_3iEdP18dlLyKojuG8BQ/edit?usp=sharing

It encapsulates important idea how to navigate trough code without actually using the terminology of col/row/range terminology.

Please drop any questions, be critical, point to any inconsistency .... I am all about it.
Thanks for working on this Zeljko! I'm a bit caught up in high priority issues but I will try to take a look next week.
Thanks Anton! No rush about it, I will come back to revising it and filling it with more details in a few weeks.
The proposed path approach sounds very sensible @Zeljko Nesic :) I don't really see any downsides or ways that it could be further improved.
@Anton Awesome, I am already having my eyes on next step :)
